name: SuperPawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store operator with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need fast access to funds or affordable merchandise options. FirstCash employs approximately 22,000 people across the United States, Latin America, and the United Kingdom, and is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's core business model centers on pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property—and retail merchandise sales. Customers can bring items of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments) to any FirstCash location, receive an immediate cash loan against that collateral, and retrieve their items by repaying the loan. The company also buys and sells merchandise directly, operates gold and precious metals buying services, and offers layaway plans requiring 10% down payments for deferred purchases.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive footprint and scale as the dominant pawn operator internationally. With over 3,300 locations across North and Latin America (including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador), FirstCash provides unmatched accessibility. The company also operates AFF, a wholly owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations, expanding beyond traditional pawn lending into alternative consumer finance.

Pawn loans are fundamentally different from other consumer credit: they require no credit check, carry no debt obligation if the item is forfeited, and provide immediate liquidity for personal property. However, interest rates on pawn loans are typically high, redemption periods are limited, and customers forfeit items if unable to repay. FirstCash is best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items and prefer collateral-based lending over credit-based borrowing.
pros: Largest pawn store chain in North and Latin America with 3,300+ locations for convenient access
No credit check required; non-recourse loans mean no debt if item is forfeited
Immediate cash on the spot for items of value with same-visit funding
Wide range of items accepted including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and instruments
Gold and precious metals buying service offering instant cash for bullion
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for merchandise purchases
Established publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) indicating financial stability
cons: Pawn loan interest rates are typically higher than personal loans or credit-based alternatives
Redemption periods are limited; failure to repay within the contract term results in forfeiture of the item
Limited transparency on the website regarding specific loan terms, interest rates, or repayment periods
Merchandise inventory varies significantly by location; items purchased may not be readily available
Layaway service requires multiple visits and 10% upfront cost; not suitable for those without partial funds
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items and cannot access traditional credit
Individuals seeking to sell gold, jewelry, or electronics for quick cash without haggling
People with poor or no credit history who need collateral-based lending
Budget-conscious shoppers looking for discounted merchandise or affordable layaway plans
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable items and need immediate liquidity without credit approval. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high interest rates, strict redemption deadlines, and the risk of permanent item loss if unable to repay—making this suitable only for short-term emergency cash needs, not ongoing credit.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Gold and precious metals buying and evaluation
Retail sales of new and used merchandise
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Non-recourse pawn lending (no debt obligation if item forfeited)
Store locator tool for finding nearest location
Online inventory browsing at select locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF
Wide merchandise selection including jewelry, electronics, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
